name: @microverse.ts/chess-lab
description: Browser chess engine duel: two Lua ChessEngine scripts compete on one board via Microverse Wasm.

scripts.generate:lua-defs: microverse generate-lua-defs --surface src/engine/chessSurface.ts --header-note "LuaLS stubs for lua/*.lua — use ChessEngine:extend() and self.bridges.*." && tsx src/generateScriptCatalogDefs.ts
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run generate:lua-defs
